pageTitle: Confirm if these documents relate to an existing application
heading: Confirm if these documents relate to an existing application
paragraph1: We usually share anything you upload with the other party, for example your landlord, housing association or mortgage provider.
paragraph2: If your application is ‘without notice’ (where you have asked us to consider your application without telling the other party) we will not share anything with them.
question: Do these documents relate to an existing application?
applicationOptionAdjourn: Yes, the documents I’m uploading relate to the application to adjourn the hearing - submitted on {{date}}
applicationOptionSetAside: Yes, the documents I’m uploading relate to the application to set aside the order - submitted on {{date}}
applicationOptionGeneric: Yes, the documents I’m uploading relate to the application submitted on {{date}}
optionClaimOrCounterclaim: No, the documents I’m uploading relate to the main claim or counterclaim

relatedApplicationId.required: Confirm if these documents relate to an existing application
